title: Sakaler Sure
desc: Bengali artists love devotional and folk songs. These songs inspire singers and audiences alike. They celebrate culture and faith, creating a shared experience.

title: Shesh Theke Shuru
desc: Mahid, a businessman, falls in love with a girl on a flight to London. Soon enough, his relationship is threatened as his dark past resurfaces.

title: Bengal Dance T20 Premier League S02
desc: A dance reality competition showcases talented performers competing in energetic routines, judged on creativity, skill, and expression in a vibrant and entertaining format.

title: Abhimaan
desc: Ashok, a business tycoon, disowns his daughter when she marries against his wishes. However, years later, he seeks the help of his grandson, Aditya, to mend his relationship with his daughter.

title: Mayer Adhikar
desc: Tarulatha Chowdhury runs her business with her manager, Milesh. Joy is the only son of Mrs. Chowdury. Some conspiracy Joy meets with an accident. Asha helps Joy recover and they both fall in love.

title: Rakto Nodir Dhara
desc: Jaga Gunda is an international terrorist. Rupen Roy arrests him and imprison him for 21 years. However, Jaga escapes from jail with the help of a corrupt cop Dibakar and kills Rupen Roy's family.

title: Pradhan
desc: A man embarks on a fierce quest for justice after his father's death. As he confronts powerful adversaries, will he succeed in his mission for vengeance?

title: Pratisodh
desc: Ranjan is imprisoned as a result of a false allegation levelled against him by Sanatan. Ranjan's father becomes insane due to these developments.

title: Badnam
desc: When a young man with good intentions is thwarted by an evil person, he starts fighting back. Though his father was defeated by the evil and corruption in the world, Shankar wishes to bring peace.

title: Paka Dekha
desc: Aparna's father fixes her marriage with the man of his choice. Disappointed with this, she runs away. Her father arrests and interrogates her friends.

title: Patanjali Yog - By Yog Rishi Swami Ramdev
desc: Baba Ramdev shows how yoga can help you. He explains different yoga poses. These poses can make your life healthier and less stressful. Learn yoga from Baba Ramdev!
